name: Shangying Global Co., Ltd.
summary: Shangying Global Co., Ltd. engages in the research and development, design, production, and sale of rigid foamed plastic panels, profiled materials, and building decoration materials in China. It also offers women's apparel. The company was formerly known as Ningxia Dayuan Chemical Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Shangying Global Co., Ltd. in August 2015. The company was founded in 1996 and is based in Shanghai, China.
